---
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  description: NULL
  model_files: NULL
  cv_objs_file: NULL
  m_input_data_file: NULL
  response_variable: "catchweight"
  cluster_vector: NULL
  save_location: NULL
---

```{r params}
# Access parameters
description  <- params$description
model_files <- params$model_files
cv_objs_file <- params$cv_objs_file
m_input_data_file <- params$m_input_data_file
resp_var <- params$response_variable
meshcutoff <- params$mesh_cutoff
clust <- params$cluster_vector
offset_cn <- params$offset_col_name
save_loc <- params$save_location
save_flag <- ifelse(is.null(save_loc), FALSE, TRUE)

cat(description, "\n")

```

```{r load_packages}
library(glmmTMB)
library(DHARMa)
library(ggOceanMaps)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(mgcv)
library(sdmTMB)
library(purrr)
library(gt)
library(scales)

src_folder_location <- "src/"

source(paste0(src_folder_location, "additional_quarto_funcs.R"))
source(paste0(src_folder_location, "Variogram_function.R"))
```

```{r collectmodels}

cv_objs <- readRDS(cv_objs_file)

ms_n  <- names(cv_objs)

ms <- setNames(
  lapply(model_files, function(m) {
    e <- new.env()
    nm <- load_object(m)
    nm
  }),
  ms_n
)

df <- load_object(m_input_data_file)

yearly_figs_h <- length(unique(df$startyear)) * 5

```

# CV models

```{r show_cv_models}

cat("Models: ", ms_n, sep = "\n")

```


# Cluster map

```{r clusteringmap, fig.cap="Clusters used for CV."}
df$clust <- clust

ggOceanMaps::basemap(df, crs=4326, land.col = "peachpuff") +
  geom_point(data=df, aes(x=longitudestart, y=latitudestart, color = as.factor(clust))) +
  labs(color = "Clusters") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Results

## All folds

```{r table_all_folds}

all_folds <- map_dfr(ms_n, function(m){
  
 AICs_total <- data.frame(
    model = m,
    AIC = AIC(ms[[m]]),
    CV_LogLik = cv_objs[[m]]$sum_loglik,
    RMSE = sqrt(mean((cv_objs[[m]]$data[[resp_var]] - cv_objs[[m]]$data$cv_predicted)^2)),
    MAE = mean(abs(cv_objs[[m]]$data[[resp_var]] - cv_objs[[m]]$data$cv_predicted)))

  
  AICs_total })


all_folds_long <- all_folds %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(AIC, CV_LogLik, RMSE, MAE),
               names_to = "metric",
               values_to = "value")

all_folds %>%
  arrange(RMSE) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Model Performance Summary",
    subtitle = "Cross-validation metrics (overall)"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(AIC, CV_LogLik, RMSE, MAE),
    decimals = 2
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    model = "Model",
    AIC = "AIC",
    CV_LogLik = "CV Log-Likelihood",
    RMSE = "RMSE",
    MAE = "MAE"
  ) %>%

  # ✅ LOWER = BETTER → green (good) to red (bad)
  data_color(
    columns = c(RMSE, MAE, AIC),
    fn = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c("#1a9850", "#d73027"),
      domain = NULL
    )
  ) %>%

  # ✅ HIGHER = BETTER (CV_LogLik)
  data_color(
    columns = CV_LogLik,
    fn = scales::col_numeric(
      palette = c("#d73027", "#1a9850"),
      domain = NULL
    )
  )


```

### Barplots

```{r all_folds_barplots}
ggplot(all_folds_long, aes(x = model, y = value, fill = model)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Model comparison (overall)",
       x = "Model", y = "Value")
```

### Scaled barplots

```{r all_scaled}
all_folds_scaled <- all_folds_long %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  mutate(value_scaled = (value - mean(value))) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(all_folds_scaled, aes(x = model, y = value_scaled, fill = model)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = "Absolute difference from mean")
```

## By fold

```{r metrics_by_fold}
by_fold <- map_dfr(ms_n, function(m){
  
    AICs_mod <- map_dfr(1:length(unique(clust)), function(clu){
    
      df_fold <- cv_objs[[m]]$data %>% mutate(clust = clust) %>% filter(clust == clu)
      
      AICs_clu <- data.frame(model = m,
                             cluster = clu,
                             AIC = cv_objs[[m]]$models[[clu]],
                             CV_LogLik = cv_objs[[m]]$fold_loglik[[clu]],
                             RMSE = sqrt(mean((df_fold[[resp_var]] - df_fold$cv_predicted)^2)),
                             MAE = mean(abs(df_fold[[resp_var]] - df_fold$cv_predicted))
                             )
      AICs_clu })
  AICs_mod })
  

by_fold_long <- by_fold %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(AIC, CV_LogLik, RMSE, MAE),
               names_to = "metric",
               values_to = "value")

ggplot(by_fold_long, aes(x = factor(cluster), y = value, color = model, group = model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Performance by fold (cluster)",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Value")
```

### Boxplots across folds

```{r distr_ac_folds}

ggplot(by_fold_long, aes(x = model, y = value, fill = model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution across folds",
       x = "Model", y = "Value")

```

### RMSE AIC tradeoff

```{r rmse_aic_tradeoff}
ggplot(by_fold, aes(x = AIC, y = RMSE, color = model, label=cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(nudge_y = 0.7, color="black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "AIC vs RMSE tradeoff")
```

### Tables by fold


```{r table_by_fold}
by_fold %>%
  arrange(model, cluster) %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "model") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Per-Fold Model Performance",
    subtitle = "Metrics by cluster/fold"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(AIC, CV_LogLik, RMSE, MAE),
    decimals = 2
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    cluster = "Cluster",
    AIC = "AIC",
    CV_LogLik = "CV Log-Likelihood",
    RMSE = "RMSE",
    MAE = "MAE"
  ) %>% 
cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = everything()
  )


```


# Individual Loglik

```{r loglikhists, results='asis'}

for (m in ms_n) {
  
  # print a true Quarto subheader (must use writeLines + results='asis')
  writeLines(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n", m))
  
  df$cv_loglik <- cv_objs[[m]]$data$cv_loglik
  
  g <- ggplot(df, aes(x = cv_loglik)) +
    geom_histogram(
      bins = 30,
      fill = "#3182bd",
      color = "white",
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_density(
      aes(y = after_stat(count)),
      color = "#e6550d",
      linewidth = 1
    ) +
    geom_vline(
      aes(xintercept = mean(cv_loglik, na.rm = TRUE)),
      color = "black",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 1
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of CV Log-Likelihood",
      subtitle = paste0("Min: ", round(min(df$cv_loglik),2), "  Med: ", 
                        round(median(df$cv_loglik),2), "  Mean: ", round(mean(df$cv_loglik),2),
                        "  Max: ", round(max(df$cv_loglik),2)),
      x = "CV Log-Likelihood",
      y = "Count"
    )
  print(g)
}

```

# Loglik maps

```{r loglikmaps, results='asis', fig.height=yearly_figs_h}

for (m in ms_n) {


  # print a true Quarto subheader (must use writeLines + results='asis')
  writeLines(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n", m))

df$cv_loglik <- cv_objs[[m]]$data$cv_loglik

g <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = df, crs = 4326, land.col = "whitesmoke") +
  geom_point(data = df,
             aes(x = longitudestart, 
                 y = latitudestart,
                 col = cv_loglik),size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8)  +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "turquoise","yellow","lightsalmon" ,"red"),
                       values = scales::rescale(c(0,2,4,6,8))) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)) +
  
  labs(color="CV loglik") +
  facet_wrap(~ startyear, ncol=1)
print(g)
}

```

```{r tweedie_var_comp, eval=TRUE, error=TRUE, results='asis', fig.height=8}
writeLines(sprintf("\n\n# %s\n", "Tweedie variance comparison"))

tweedie_variance_comp(model_names = ms_n,
                      model_files = model_files)

```

```{r save_results, eval=save_flag, include = FALSE}

#cv_tables <- list(all_folds, by_fold, by_fold_ranked_wide)

cv_df <- df

for (m_n in ms_n){
  cv_df[[paste0("pred_", m_n)]] <- predict(ms[[m_n]], type = "response")$est
  cv_df[[paste0("cv_loglik_", m_n)]] <- cv_objs[[m_n]]$data$cv_loglik
  cv_df[[paste0("cv_predicted_", m_n)]] <- cv_objs[[m_n]]$data$cv_predicted
  cv_df[[paste0("cv_fold_", m_n)]] <- cv_objs[[m_n]]$data$cv_fold
}

#cv_results <- list(cv_tables, cv_df)

saveRDS(cv_df, file = save_loc)


```
